info.name: Social Media API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Social Media Backend. 

## Authentication
Protected endpoints require a `Bearer` token in the `Authorization` header.
1. Use `POST /api/auth/register` to create an account
2. Use `POST /api/auth/login` to get your JWT token
3. Set `{{token}}` in the collection variable with the token you receive

## Public Endpoints (no auth needed)
- GET all posts
- GET post by ID
- GET posts by user
- GET comments for a post
- GET user by username

## Protected Endpoints (require JWT token)
- Create post
- Delete post (only your own)
- Add comment
- Delete comment (only your own)
- Like a post
- Remove a like (only your own)
